sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_words (text String, min_hash UInt64, max_hash UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY text;
INSERT INTO test_words VALUES ('ClickHouse is a powerful DBMS for OLAP queries', wordShingleMinHashUTF8('ClickHouse is a powerful DBMS for OLAP queries'));
UPDATE test_words SET min_hash = wordShingleMinHashUTF8(text).1 WHERE text = 'ClickHouse is a powerful DBMS for OLAP queries';
SELECT wordShingleMinHashUTF8(text) FROM test_words WHERE text LIKE '%DBMS%';
CREATE TABLE test_comparisons AS SELECT a.text AS text_a, b.text AS text_b FROM test_words AS a, test_words AS b WHERE a.text != b.text;
